name: Ripple Button
description: Material Design-style ripple effect button with multiple concurrent ripples expanding from click point.
accessibility_notes: ripple is decorative — button remains a standard interactive element

rippleColor.description: Ripple color as RGB tuple or palette name

onClick.description: Click handler passed through to the button

className.description: CSS class for the button element

conflicts: overflow:hidden clips content outside button bounds
inline keyframes style tag added per component instance
